creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
garga       2009-02-23 12:47:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    print                Makefile 
  Added files:
    print/p5-PostScript  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  PostScript allows you to write PostScript files from Perl.
  It has graphics primitives that allow lines, circles and boxes to be drawn.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/PostScript/
  
  PR:             ports/131990
  Submitted by:   Fernan Aguero <fernan.aguero at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.469     +1 -0      ports/print/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/print/p5-PostScript/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/print/p5-PostScript/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/print/p5-PostScript/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/print/p5-PostScript/pkg-plist (new)
